listeners.purpose: Dispatches SyncFromCashierWebhookJob. Handles stripe + paddle providers. Idempotent via provider_event_id.
On workspace creation, create a free-tier Subscription (or trial-tier if workspaces::event.metadata.trial=true).
GDPR Art. 17. Cancels subscription at Cashier (best-effort) + soft-deletes local rows. Retains SubscriptionEvent for SOX.
Sends escalation email to workspace owner + billing contact when workspace suspended for non-payment.
